Item Description: Inspection titled with lot ID (LOT-SW-NNNN - name) and line/structure extent stated (MH to MH)
Trench excavation to design line and level; ground conditions as assumed (S)
Bedding material conforms (grading certificate on file)
Pipe class and jointing as per drawings; pipes undamaged on delivery
Bedding compacted and screeded to grade (W)
Pipe laid to line and grade - as-laid survey within tolerance
Joints made and lubricated per manufacturer; deflection within limits
Haunch and side support placed and compacted in layers
Trench backfill compaction test requests issued (record lot ID)
CCTV / mirror test - no defects joints displacement or debris (W)
Superintendent release prior to trench closure over joints (H)
